text: Toodaloo, mother-truckers!
Guess who's back? Back again? Chow's back. Tell a friend.
Good morning, sunshine. I'm the sunshine. Deal with it.
So long! Chow has left the building, baby!
Sleep is a rumor spread by boring people.
Bring a marble skateboard to the VIP section or don't bother.
Meet me in Vegas. Dress sensational or go home.
Meet me in the winner's circle. Dress dangerous or go home.
I'd explain, but you're not legendary enough to understand.
Call me legendary, because I am, and you were about to.
If sensational were illegal, I'd be doing life. Worth it.
In a party you weren't invited to, they name drinks after me.
Doubt me and I'll be flawless about it in the winner's circle.
Watch me turn your car into something magnificent.
Watch me turn your car into something unstoppable.
Gotta bounce. My reflection needs attention.
I'd stay, but I have to go be amazing somewhere else.
And that's how you leave a room. You're welcome.
I brought an angry swan into Vegas and called it a plan.
I don't cause trouble. Trouble sees me and gets ambitious.
